# Datazag

> Datazag is a UK-based cybersecurity intelligence platform for platform-impersonation defence. It detects attacker infrastructure — lookalike domains and spoofed SaaS/email platforms — at the moment of provisioning, before campaigns launch, and feeds the detections into customers' existing security stacks as data. Every detection ships with the reasoning that drove it.

All intelligence runs on the Datazag Graph: a continuously refreshed graph of the internet's infrastructure (330M+ active domains, CertStream, BGP, DNS) with signal correlation, explainable risk scoring, real-time telemetry and routing-hygiene verification built in.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://www.datazag.com/): Catch the fake login page before your team receives it — the predictive layer alongside your security stack.
- [How the Graph works](https://www.datazag.com/how-it-works): The Datazag Graph engine — signal correlation, explainable risk scoring, real-time telemetry, routing-hygiene verification, and the four named mechanisms (Platform Fingerprinting, Corpus Matching, Build-Time Detection, Pre-Arrival Blocking).
- [Alerts](https://www.datazag.com/alerts): Real-time alerts for phishing, BEC, C2 and fraud infrastructure, detected during setup and delivered to your SIEM with forensic context.
- [Data product (domain intelligence)](https://www.datazag.com/infrastructure-intelligence): JOIN-ready domain intelligence via cloud data shares, real-time API and webhooks across Snowflake, Databricks, AWS, Azure and GCP.
- [Brand Protection](https://www.datazag.com/brand-protection): Brand impersonation monitoring and evidence packs for marketing, legal and trust teams.
- [Pricing](https://www.datazag.com/pricing): Plans and tiers.

## Partners

- [MSSP partners](https://www.datazag.com/mssp-partners): White-labelled phishing and platform-impersonation protection across a client portfolio.
- [ESP partners](https://www.datazag.com/esp-partners): Deliverability protection, compliance and a resale revenue stream for email service providers.
- [Cyber insurers](https://www.datazag.com/cyber-risk-underwriting): External cyber-posture assessment for underwriting and portfolio monitoring.

## Company

- [About](https://www.datazag.com/about): About Datazag.
- [Contact](https://www.datazag.com/contact): Get in touch.
- [Trust](https://www.datazag.com/trust): Security, privacy and responsible disclosure.

## Notes

- Locked figures: 330M+ active domains; <10s ingestion latency from CertStream; ~1.23M BGP prefixes and ~78,600 autonomous systems monitored.
- Threat-feed sources are described generically (independent abuse and routing intelligence), not named.
